vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Token IDs Reference for MiniCPM-V When Images are Provided With No Placeholders
vllm.author: alex-jw-brooks
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #8990
Super small change to move the llm_inputs.get("prompt_token_ids") out of the conditional for when the prompt is None so that if len(image_tags) == 0, it doesn't throw from token_ids being undefined.

vllm.title: [Core] [Frontend] Priority scheduling for embeddings and in the OpenAI-API
vllm.author: schoennenbeck
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This makes the new priority scheduling available to users of the OpenAI-API (and fixes some missing priority-handling for embedding-related methods).

Added priority field to CompletionRequest, ChatCompletionRequest, and EmbeddingRequest with description
Added priority to the generate- and encode-me

vllm.title: [Doc] Update list of supported models
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds the missing DeepSeek, DeepSeek-V2 and Granite models to the Supported Models page.

vllm.title: Update benchmark_serving.py to read and write json-datasets, results in UTF8, for better compatibility with Windows
vllm.author: vlsav
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Update benchmark_serving.py to read and write json-datasets, results in UTF8, for better compatibility with Windows
[Bugfix] for bug fixes.
Benchmarking script doesn't work under windows, because typically Windows codepage in not UTF-8, but this codepage used to when dataset files opened or results

vllm.title: [Spec Decode] (1/2) Remove batch expansion
vllm.author: LiuXiaoxuanPKU
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a clean up PR for #5691 because that PR is stale. RFC
Some constraints:

This PR current does not support cuda graph. It will be addressed in the follow up PR.
MQA scorer is only enabled for flash attention backend.
It does not support ngram because MQA scorer does not handle mixed batches.
